title: Fantasy Currency [D&D Coins]
description: Fantasy Currency based on the coins from Dungeons & Dragons. [FRAMEWORK]
body:
## Adds the 5 main coins from the popular TTRPG Dungeons & Dragons!
### Copper/Silver/Electrum/Gold/Platinum

The mod is VERY barebones and is meant to be used as a framework for a currency system, therefore allowing customization for other mod developers/modpack developers.

This mod **DOES ADD** recipes to convert coins into each other.

This mod **DOES NOT ADD** trades, traders, and/or mechanics that require these coins.

## SPRITES ARE SUBJECT TO CHANGE IN THE FUTURE!!!
